title: tragacantha stipulata
intro: Tragacantha stipulata, also known as Thorny Broom or Broom Thistle, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Its medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its leaves, stems, and roots, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Tragacantha stipulata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. Tragacantha stipulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, although its effectiveness and safety should be further studied and confirmed.
